founder_identity: Non-coder who built Grid Control (18-agent marketing OS) using Claude. Has never written a line of code. Bridges AI gaps for businesses without making them learn to code.
product: Two products sold through ASKGauravAI: (1) Reporting Project — pre-advertising intelligence reports (₹2.5-7k), (2) Grid Control services — content system setup, monthly retainers, strategy sessions (₹15-50k+).
business_type: Personal Brand → Intelligence Reports + Done-for-you Content Systems + Monthly Retainers
brand_brief: Gaurav is a non-coder who built an 18-agent marketing OS using Claude — proving you don't need to write code to build serious AI systems. ASKGauravAI is the public-facing brand that reveals the back-end of AI work that other creators hide: the real hours, the real costs, the assumptions baked into 'magic' prompts, and the places AI broke and a human had to fix it. Content is forward-only — documents what's being built right now. Two products: intelligence reports (Reporting Project) and execution services (Grid Control). Sold through ASKGauravAI content, no separate social profiles for products.
unique_tension: AI creators show the magic. Gaurav shows the back-end they hide.
back_end_weapons: Time truth — '5-minute build' actually = 40 hours of prompt iteration
Cost truth — real API spend, tool stack costs, error-rerun bills
Failure truth — where AI broke and a human fixed it manually
Assumption truth — why a viral prompt only works in its specific context
audience: D2C founders who spend on agencies but get Canva calendars back
Small brand owners running their own marketing with no data
Agency owners who want to scale without hiring 10 more people
Solopreneurs who want a marketing system, not another tool
Founders who know AI matters but feel overwhelmed by jargon
not_for_audience: Job-seekers wanting to learn AI to get hired
People looking for free AI tool lists
target_audience: Non-technical founders, agency owners, and solopreneurs who know AI matters but are stuck between 'I know I should use AI' and 'AI is actually running my marketing.' They want intelligence and execution, not more tools to figure out themselves.
market: Global. No geographic limitations. Pricing in both INR and USD.
language: English ONLY. No Hinglish. No Hindi words. All content — video, audio, text, captions, carousels — in plain conversational English. Locked May 25 2026.

content_model.derivatives: 4-6 Shorts/Reels, 2-3 carousels, 3-4 LinkedIn posts, 2-3 X threads, TikTok reposts
content_model.principle: Document don't create. Give give give, then ask. Platform-native derivatives, not cross-posts.
content_model.on_camera: Gaurav's face on camera. No AI clone for Month 1.

tone_of_voice: Plain conversational English. Founder-to-founder. Uses real numbers, never vague claims. Reveals what the audience didn't know they didn't know. Never lectures — diagnoses.
visual_aesthetic: Clean white/cream backgrounds, Notion/Linear-startup feel. NOT dark mode. NOT tech-bro aesthetic. NOT generic-AI dreamy renders.

production_gear.video_broll: GoPro Hero 7 Black (behind-the-scenes, wide shots, hands/screen)
production_gear.voice_synthesis_disabled: ElevenLabs cancelled. All voice = Gaurav's actual recorded voice.

reporting_project.name: TBD — needs naming
reporting_project.delivery: Automated: form → Razorpay payment → Apify scraping → Claude analysis → ReportLab PDF → email
reporting_project.website: From Day 1. Purchase flow on website.

grid_control_future.saas: After 2 months of testing on 4 brands. Client dashboard login.

revenue_funnel.entry: Reporting Project report (₹2.5-7k) — lowest friction, automated
revenue_funnel.mid: Grid Control services (₹15-50k) — content system setup, strategy sessions

brands_grid_control_runs_on: OffGrid Creatives AI (Grid Control product page)
Third Gen Tribe (fashion brand — on hold until Month 2)

social_identity_structure.askgauravai: Growth engine. Gaurav's face. Sells everything. Trust layer.
social_identity_structure.offgrid_creatives_ai: Grid Control product page. Demos, results, case studies. Checkout destination.
social_identity_structure.third_gen_tribe: Fashion brand. Independent. Becomes a live case study for ASKGauravAI.
social_identity_structure.reporting_project: Landing page for payments only. NO social profile. Promoted via ASKGauravAI.

grid_control_naming_rule.askgauravai: SILENT Week 1-2. Reference as 'a system I built' / 'my AI system'. Nameable from Week 3+.
grid_control_naming_rule.offgrid_creatives_ai: Named freely. This IS the Grid Control brand page.

content_rules.zero_assumptions: Every data point traces to a real scrape, API call, or user input. If unavailable → STOP, ask. Never fabricate.
content_rules.real_data_mandate: All scripts, hooks, and topics must be backed by real scraped trend data, competitor data, or engagement metrics. No generic content.
content_rules.approval_gate: Every output → pending_approval/. Approved manually → approved/.
content_rules.week_1_cta: Pure value. Zero sales. No CTAs to buy anything. Jab jab jab.

what_to_never_say: Generic AI guru language ('master AI in 7 days')
Direct hire-me / sales pitches in public posts
Past client portfolio reveals — content is forward-only
Technical implementation details that exclude non-coders
Promising deliverables that don't exist yet
north_star_metric_definition: Inbound DMs from founders/agency owners describing a specific AI bottleneck or asking about reports/services. Quality over follower count.
brand_face: Gaurav on camera. Real voice. No AI clone Month 1.
